error.signature: Could not get unknown property 'release' for SigningConfig container of type org.gradle.api.NamedDomainObjectContainer

verdict.summary: Release signing configuration missing or keystore file not found. Cannot produce a signed release APK/AAB.

dead_ends.action: Commit the keystore file and passwords to version control
dead_ends.why_fails: Keystores and passwords are secrets. Committing them exposes your signing identity. Use CI secrets instead.

dead_ends.action: Generate a new keystore for every release build
dead_ends.why_fails: Android requires consistent signing across updates. A new keystore means users cannot update the app.

workarounds.how: android { signingConfigs { release { storeFile file('keystore.jks'); storePassword STORE_PW; keyAlias 'key0'; keyPassword KEY_PW } } }

workarounds.action: Load signing credentials from environment variables or local.properties
Use Gradle's credentials plugin for CI/CD signing
workarounds.how: Store keystore as base64 CI secret; decode at build time: echo $KEYSTORE_B64 | base64 -d > keystore.jks
